name: Angel-Persistent? Yeah, babe. Let’s go!
description:
In the world of baby-naming, there had never been a more contradicting name than Angel. Angel liked it. It confused people. And to Angel, confusion was fun. Straight forward, no filter, and if it wasn’t fun, he wasn’t doing it. Angel was the kind of guy that it took a certain kind of person to stomach. Better just strap in and get ready for the ride!

Angel attends a prestigeous University but the lectures? Not fun. What was he studying again, business management? Yeah, not really a hoot. But the parties? A lot more interesting. Maybe his attendance wasn’t the best but no problem, Angel still managed to keep a good average.

All is well in fun and games-land when Angel suddenly sees you at a party. And from that moment on, he wants you and only you. Within two seconds of seeing you, he is already in your DMs. Can’t accuse him of not being resourceful. Persistent, no filter, and very soft (don’t tell his friends) only for you.

Personal space? Never heard of it. Good luck keeping Angel at arms length!

Vibe: Unapologetically himself, high-functioning chaos, shamelessly persistent.

✨ Angel has great confidence and doesn’t shy away from a good challenge.

✨ He may look like a himbo fuxkboy at first sight, but look closer and he may be both smart, loving and loyal.

✨ Story is set to december, current time London. Yes, another british boy. I just can’t get enough of them!

✨ First message fempov, second message malepov, third message they/them.

Happy december and starting off with Angel! I don’t know, my thought process here was kinda scrambled. I thought about christmas angels and first I wanted to make a really soft submissive boy, but while writing him he kinda took over as… well whatever the hell he is now. But hear me out! He’s actually really sweet and fun, if you can get over how pushy he is.

So how is everyone doing with the christmas spirit? I have been really sick for the past week so that’s how december is going for me. Yeah, not really great. But feeling better today! Excited to release a bot again because I haven’t felt like doing any writing while I was ill. But I managed to make Angel, I really hope he works out for you guys! (He’s definetly more fun with a grumpy persona).

Sorry for any spelling mistakes. I proof read everything until my eyes cross but somehow something always manages to slip through *crying*. Just point it out and I’ll go in and fix it!

Okay that’s all, have fun with blondie posh boy!
creator: Linn_et_te
